item.title: Prove You're Coachable & Proactive 🌟 • Ask for feedback regularly and implement it. • Share examples of how you improved from feedback. • Showcase projects where you took initiative. • Use: “I sought feedback and improved my project by X%.” • Demonstrate continuous learning through courses. How will you demonstrate your adaptability and initiative in your next role? #careerdevelopment #interviewtips #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Prove You're Coachable & Proactive 🌟 • Ask for feedback regularly and implement it. • Share examples of how you improved from feedback. • Showcase projects where you took initiative. • Use: “I sought feedback and improved my project by X%.” • Demonstrate continuous learning through courses. How will you demonstrate your adaptability and initiative in your next role? #careerdevelopment #interviewtips #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
